title: Vietnamese Tart with Crispy Haddock
description: A sweet and savory Vietnamese-inspired tart filled with crispy haddock and topped with a crumbly crust.

ingredients.name: crumbly topping
ingredients.notes: made with crushed crackers and butter

instructions: Roll out the tart crust and place it in a tart pan.
In a pan, heat the butter over medium heat.
Add the haddock and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
In a bowl, mix together the fish sauce, sugar, egg, and salt.
Arrange the cooked haddock in the tart crust.
Pour the fish sauce mixture over the haddock.
Sprinkle the crumbly topping over the filling.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
